info.title: Fixed Asset – Post Asset Retirement
info.description: This service contains the nodes required for retirement postings. These include the following nodes: posting date, ledger, valuation, and posting amount.

x-sap-shortText: Make postings for asset retirements using this service

values.text: [Asset Accounting – Group Ledger IFRS (1GB)](https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolP/1GB " Link To BP ")
